title: Agentic AI in the enterprise: Why architecture matters more than marketing claims
summary: Traditional marketing automation relies on knowing rules ahead of time. Agentic systems maintain goals, reason over available actions, invoke tools, evaluate intermediate results, and adapt their plans as new information becomes available.
caption: output/2026-07-21/agentic-ai-in-the-enterprise-why-architecture-matters-more-than-market.txt
